project.name: EMS - Energy Management System
project.description: IoT-based energy monitoring platform for Smart Agritech Lab. Multi-tenant: Super Admin → Organizations → Users. Devices push sensor readings; platform stores, computes, and visualizes energy metrics with AI analytics.
project.design_notes: Every entity (devices, gateways, slaves, templates, variables, icons) has full CRUD — the lab can add their own custom machines, sensors, and data types at any point. Nothing is hardcoded.

User.notes: SUPER_ADMIN has no organizationId. OrgAdmin and User are scoped to one org.

Organization.notes: One org = one lab or company. Super admin creates orgs and assigns users to them.

Gateway.notes: Physical hardware box. One gateway can have multiple devices attached.

DeviceTemplate.notes: Defines what variables a device type reports. Fully customizable — lab adds their own templates. Drives dashboard widget generation.

Device.notes: Physical device/meter. Has slaves (sub-meters/channels) as a separate collection.

Slave.notes: Sub-meter or channel within a device. A simple single-channel device gets one default slave named 'Main'. Enables Device→Slave dropdown on all user dashboard pages.

SensorReading.notes: Core time-series collection. Written by IoT ingest endpoint. High-volume — TTL index set. All dashboard metrics computed from this. Indexed on (deviceId, slaveId, timestamp).

Anomaly.notes: Written when ingest detects threshold breach against alarm templates. Powers Anomalies Detail page and dashboard anomaly count widget.

AlarmTemplate.notes: User-defined rules: if VoltageA > 250 → Overvoltage anomaly. Checked on every ingest.

AlarmContact.notes: Who to notify when alarm fires. Linked to AlarmSetting.

AlarmSetting.notes: Wires an alarm template to notification delivery config.

Notification.notes: In-app notification inbox per user. Created when anomaly fires.

ScheduledTask.notes: Cron-style tasks to set a device variable ON/OFF at a time. node-cron evaluates these. Lab can schedule their own irrigation pumps, heaters, etc.

SlabRate.notes: Electricity tariff tiers per slave. Backend uses these to compute cost in IntervalHistory.

IntervalHistory.notes: Billing period records. Backend computes totalUnit from SensorReading aggregation over date range, applies SlabRate, stores result.

Prediction.notes: Pre-seeded dummy predicted values. Served to AI Analytics page. No real ML — realistic dummy data already in DB.

Icon.notes: Icon library (AC, Current, Furnace, etc.) used by DeviceTemplate variables and dashboard widgets.

Product.notes: Hardware product catalog (M100, N510 gateways). Displayed on user Products page.

Theme.notes: Color themes. Assigned to organizations. Applied on user login.

SystemSetting.notes: Key-value system config store. e.g. AdminLoginLogo.

ListItem.notes: Generic lookup/enum table. Admins can add new protocols, drivers, etc. Powers all dropdowns.

Subscription.notes: Service inquiry form submissions from user side. Super admin reviews these.

DeviceTimestamp.notes: Updated by ingest on every reading. Powers Device Timestamps page showing online/offline/last-seen.

models: all Mongoose models, one file per model
controllers: one file per resource, matching route file

endpoints.desc: Login for all roles. Returns JWT in httpOnly cookie. Body: {email, password}. Returns user object with role.
Clears JWT cookie.
Returns current user profile from JWT. Used on app load to restore session.
List all orgs. Supports pagination, search by name, filter by status.
Create org. Body: {name, description}. Auto-sets status: active.
Update org name, description, themeId, status.
Soft-delete org (set status: inactive). Does not delete child records.

USERS.access: SUPER_ADMIN (all users), ORG_ADMIN (own org users only)

endpoints.desc: List users. SUPER_ADMIN: all users with org filter, role filter, status filter, search. ORG_ADMIN: only their org's users.
Create user. Body: {fullName, email, password, phone, role, organizationId}. SUPER_ADMIN can set any role. ORG_ADMIN can only create USER role in their org.
Update user. Can toggle status active/inactive/deleted. Cannot change role to SUPER_ADMIN unless caller is SUPER_ADMIN.
Soft-delete user (status: deleted).
Admin resets a user's password. Body: {newPassword}.
List gateways. Filters: organizationId, status (online|offline), model, search by name/serial. Returns total/online/offline counts in header.
Add gateway. Body: {name, serialNumber, model, organizationId}.
Update gateway name, model, org assignment.
Delete gateway. Warns if devices are attached.
Link an existing device to this gateway.
List templates with totalVariables count and associatedDevices count. Filters: organizationId, search by name.
Get template detail including full variables array with icons.
Create template. Body: {name, organizationId, acquisitionMethod, variables:[{name,unit,registerAddress,iconId,displayName}]}.
Update template name or variables. If variables change, does NOT break existing SensorReadings — readings store variableName as string.
Delete template. Blocked if devices are using it.
Clone template into a new one. Useful for creating lab-specific variants.
List devices. Filters: organizationId, gatewayId, userId (assigned), status, search by name. Returns switchState per device.
Single device detail with template info and linked slaves.
Add device. Body: {name, gatewayId, organizationId, templateId}. Auto-creates one default Slave named 'Main'.
Update device name, gateway, template, switch state (on|off).
Delete device. Cascades: deletes its slaves, sensor readings, anomalies, scheduled tasks.
Toggle device switchState on/off. Updates device doc. In future can send command to gateway.
List all slaves for a device. Always returns at least the default 'Main' slave.
Add a slave/sub-meter to a device. Body: {name, description}.
Update slave name or description.
Delete slave. Blocked if it is the only (default) slave.

INGEST.access: Gateway device (API key auth, not JWT)

endpoints.desc: IoT device pushes readings. Body: {gatewaySerial, deviceId, slaveId, readings:[{variableName, value}]}. Steps: 1) Validate API key. 2) Write SensorReading doc. 3) Update DeviceTimestamp. 4) Run anomalyDetector.check(). 5) If anomaly: write Anomaly doc, create Notification, emit Socket.IO event to org room. 6) Emit live reading via Socket.IO to dashboard subscribers.
Latest reading per variable for a device+slave. Powers the Detail page (live variable cards). Query: {deviceId, slaveId}.
Historical readings for a device+slave+variable over a date range. Query: {deviceId, slaveId, variableName, startDate, endDate, limit}. Powers Historical Data table+chart.
Aggregated metric for a variable over time range and interval (1h|24h|7d|30d). Returns [{timestamp, value}] for chart widgets. Powers all dashboard chart widgets.

One call that returns all 9 dashboard widget values for a device+slave+timeRange. Computes: totalPowerConsumption, totalExportPower, voltageImbalance%, currentImbalance, powerFactor, predictedConsumption, anomalyCount+breakdown, thdV, thdI, frequency, energySavingsComparison(daily/weekly/monthly).
Delete readings for a device+slave over a date range. SUPER_ADMIN only.
Download readings as CSV. Query: {deviceId, slaveId, variableName, startDate, endDate}. Streams CSV response.
List anomalies. Filters: deviceId, slaveId, type, timeRange (1h|24h|7d|30d|custom). Returns total count + breakdown by type. Powers Anomalies Detail page and dashboard widget.
Anomaly count per time bucket (30min intervals) for timeline chart. Query: {deviceId, slaveId, timeRange}.
Mark anomaly as acknowledged.

Template Triggers (AlarmTemplate).desc: List alarm templates. Filters: organizationId, search by trigger name/template name.
Create template trigger. Body: {name, organizationId, templateId, conditions:[{variableName, operator, threshold, anomalyType, priority}]}.

Alarm Settings.desc: List alarm configurations. Filters: organizationId, alarmTemplateId.
Create alarm setting. Body: {name, organizationId, alarmTemplateId, pushType, pushBody, pushMethod, pushingMechanism, contactIds}.
Update push config or linked contacts.

Alarm Contacts.desc: List alarm contacts. Filters: organizationId, search by name/phone.
Add contact. Body: {name, organizationId, mobile, email, whatsapp, remark}.

endpoints.desc: List all devices with lastActiveAt, computed 'lastActive ago' string, and online/offline status (online if lastActiveAt < 5 min ago). Paginated.
List tasks. Filters: organizationId, deviceId. Returns slave name, variable, action, time, repeat type, status.
Create task. Body: {deviceId, slaveId, variableName, action, scheduledTime, repeatType, daysOfWeek}. Registers with node-cron. Lab adds their own pump/heater schedules here.
Update task. Re-registers cron job.
Delete task and remove from cron.
Toggle task active/inactive.
List slab rates. Filter by deviceId/slaveId.
Add slab tier. Body: {slaveId, unitFrom, unitTo, rate, onPeakRate, offPeakRate}. Multiple tiers per slave.
Update tier. Triggers recalculation of affected interval histories.
Delete tier.
List billing intervals. Filter by slaveId.

Add billing interval. Body: {slaveId, variableName, startDate, endDate}. Backend: 1) Queries SensorReading to sum kWh in range. 2) Applies matching SlabRate tiers. 3) Computes and stores totalUnit + tariff.
Delete interval record.
Get user's alarm notification inbox. Paginated. Returns trigger name, device, description, time.
Delete all notifications for current user.
Delete single notification.
Get predicted readings. Query: {deviceId, slaveId, variableName, horizon (10min|5hr|7day|custom), startDate, endDate}. Returns [{timestamp, predictedValue}]. Served from pre-seeded Prediction docs.
Returns current voltage imbalance value + anomaly list (time, type) + predicted voltage chart data for device+slave.
Same structure for current imbalance.
Same structure for power factor.
Energy consumption trend + predicted consumption + anomaly list.
List icons. Filter by status. Paginated.
Upload icon. Multipart: {name, imageFile}. Uploads to Cloudinary.
Update icon name or image.
Delete icon. Blocked if used in device templates.
List products with image, price, description, status. Paginated.
Add product. Multipart: {name, price, description, imageFile}.
Update product.
Delete product.
List all themes with color swatches and font size. Paginated.
Create theme. Body: {name, headerFontColor, headerBgColor, bodyFontColor, bodyBgColor, fontSize}.
Update theme.
Delete theme. Blocked if assigned to any org.
Assign theme to an organization. Body: {organizationId}.
List all system settings. Filter by type.
Update a setting value. Handles file upload for Logo type settings.
Delete a setting.
List all items. Filter by listType (protocols_and_drivers, acquisition_methods, etc.).
Add new item. Body: {listType, name, description}. Lab adds their own protocol or custom type here.
Update item.
Delete item.
Submit service inquiry. Body: {name, email, phone, description}. No auth required. Creates Subscription doc with status: new.
SUPER_ADMIN: list all inquiries. Filter by status.
Update inquiry status (contacted|closed).

services.anomalyDetector.js: Called by ingest on each reading. Loads active AlarmTemplate for the device's template. Checks each condition against incoming variable values. If breached: writes Anomaly, calls notificationService.
services.costCalculator.js: Called when IntervalHistory is created or SlabRate updated. Aggregates SensorReading kWh for the given slave+variable+dateRange. Applies matching slab tiers (including on-peak/off-peak logic). Stores computed totalUnit and tariff.
services.schedulerService.js: On server start: loads all active ScheduledTasks from DB and registers node-cron jobs. On task CRUD: adds/removes/updates cron entries. On trigger: updates device variable in DB and emits socket event.
services.notificationService.js: Creates Notification doc for the affected user. If AlarmSetting has email push: sends email via Nodemailer. Socket.IO emit to user's room for real-time notification badge update.

frontend.structure_note: Next.js 14 App Router. Two separate route groups: (superadmin) and (user). Each has its own layout with sidebar. Auth guard in middleware.ts.

/login.desc: Login page for all roles. Single form: email + password. On success, redirects to /superadmin or /dashboard based on role.

super_admin.layout: Sidebar with all SA nav items. Top bar with notification icon and logout.

/superadmin/organizations.desc: Manage Organizations list. Table: name, description, creation time, status badge, edit/delete actions. Add Organization button opens modal form.

/superadmin/users.desc: Manage Users list. Table: org, full name, email, phone, role, status, creation time, edit/delete/reset-password actions. Filter by org and status.

/superadmin/gateways.desc: Manage Gateways. Summary bar: total/online/offline counts. Table: status badge, name, serial, model, associated devices count, org, edit/link/delete.

/superadmin/devices.desc: Manage Devices list. Table: status, name, org, gateway, template, switch toggle, view/edit/delete. Batch delete. Export CSV.

/superadmin/devices/templates.desc: Device Templates. Table: name, org, variable count, associated devices, acquisition method, last updated. Add/clone/edit/delete.

/superadmin/icons.desc: Icon library. Table: name, icon preview image, status, add/edit/delete. Upload icon via file picker.

/superadmin/products.desc: Hardware product catalog. Table: name, price, image thumbnail, description, status, edit/delete.

/superadmin/data/variable-alarm-records.desc: Variable Alarm Records. Filters: device, trigger, variable, alarm state, date range. Table: device, trigger, type, slave, variable, current value, condition, alarm time, alarm state, process state.

/superadmin/data/linkage-records.desc: Linkage Records. Filters: device, trigger, variable, date range. Table: device, trigger, type, slave, variable, condition, trigger device, linkage time.

/superadmin/data/historical.desc: Historical Data. Filters: device, date range, slave, variable (multi-select). Table: variable, value, received time. Line chart on right. Download CSV, Delete Data buttons.

/superadmin/alarm-linkage/template-trigg.desc: Template Triggers list. Table: trigger name, org, template name, founder, update time. Add/edit/delete.

/superadmin/alarm-linkage/alarm-settings.desc: Alarm Settings list. Table: config name, org, push type, body, method, mechanism, status, founder, update time. Add/edit/delete.

/superadmin/alarm-linkage/alarm-contacts.desc: Alarm Contacts list. Table: contact name, org, mobile, email, WhatsApp, remark, added by, update time. Add/edit/delete.

/superadmin/device-timestamps.desc: Device Timestamps. Table: device name, last activity datetime, time-ago string, online/offline status badge. No filters needed — shows all.

/superadmin/scheduled-tasks.desc: Manage Scheduled Tasks. Table: serial, device+variable, action (ON/OFF badge), scheduled time, repeat type, status, created by. Add/edit/toggle/delete.

/superadmin/themes.desc: Theme Settings. Table: serial, name, header colors (font+bg swatches), body colors, font size, status, created by/date. Add/edit/assign to org/delete.

/superadmin/settings.desc: System settings key-value store. Table: key, type badge, value preview, description, last updated. Edit values (file upload for logo type).

/superadmin/others/list.desc: Manage Lists (lookup enums). Filter by list type. Table: list type, name, description. Add/edit/delete. Lab adds custom protocols or driver types here.

/superadmin/subscriptions.desc: Service inquiries submitted by users. Table: name, email, phone, description, status, date. Update status to contacted/closed.

user.layout: Sidebar: Manage Dashboard, Subscription, Products, Schedule, Manage Slab Rates, Manage Interval History, Alarm Template, Notification, Manage AI Analytics. Top bar: notification bell badge + logout.

/dashboard.desc: Main energy monitoring dashboard. Device + Slave dropdowns at top. 9 metric cards in 3-col grid, each with 1h/24h/7d/30d toggle and mini chart: Total Power Consumption (bar), Total Export Power (bar), Voltage Imbalance % (area), Current Imbalance (area), Real Time Power Factor (line), Predicted Consumption (line), Anomalies (count + type list + pagination), THD-V (line), THD-I (line), Frequency (line). Bottom: Energy Savings Comparison cards (Daily/Weekly/Monthly % vs prior period). Download Data button.
/dashboard.realtime: Socket.IO subscription to org room for live updates on readings

/dashboard/detail.desc: Live variable cards grid. Device + Slave selector. Shows all variables from the device's template as individual cards: variable name with icon, current value with unit. Auto-refreshes every 30s or via Socket.IO.

/subscription.desc: Service inquiry form. Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Description/Requirement. Submit sends inquiry to super admin.

/products.desc: Product Catalog. Displays hardware products from super admin catalog: image, name, price, description. Read-only browse.

/schedule.desc: User's scheduled tasks. Device filter dropdown. Table: slave, variable, action, scheduled time, repeat type, status. Add/edit/toggle/delete tasks for own devices.

/slab-rates.desc: Electricity tariff configuration. Device filter. Table: slave, unit from, unit to, rate, on-peak rate, off-peak rate. Add/edit/delete slab tiers for own slaves.

/interval-history.desc: Billing period records. Device filter. Table: variable name, slave name, total units (kWh), tariff (PKR), start date, end date. Add Interval triggers backend cost computation.

/alarm-template.desc: User's alarm templates. Table: trigger name, org, template name, founder, update time. Add/edit/delete templates for own devices.

/notifications.desc: Alarm notification inbox. Table: trigger name, device name, description, time. Delete All button. Badge count on sidebar icon.

/ai/readings.desc: AI Analytics — Predicted Readings. Tabs: Next 10 Min / Next 5 Hours / Next 7 Days / Custom date. Device+Slave+Variable(multi) filters. Table: variable name, predicted value, timestamp. Line chart on right.

/ai/voltage-imbalance.desc: Voltage Imbalance Detail. Device+Slave filters. Left: current imbalance value (large), anomaly table (time, type) with pagination. Right: Predicted Voltage bar chart (1h/24h/7d/30d toggle) + Voltage Over Time bar chart.

/ai/current-imbalance.desc: Current Imbalance Detail. Same layout as voltage imbalance but for current. Anomaly types: Overload.

/ai/power-factor.desc: Power Factor Detail. Same layout. Shows current PF value, Low Power Factor anomaly list, Predicted PF line chart, PF Over Time bar chart.

/ai/energy-consumption.desc: Energy Consumption Detail. Shows total consumption value, anomaly list, Predicted Consumption line chart, Consumption Over Time bar chart.

/ai/anomalies.desc: Anomalies Detail page. Device+Slave filters. Left: total anomaly count (large red), timeline area chart (1h/24h/7d/30d). Right: Issues Breakdown horizontal bar chart by type with color coding + legend (type, category, priority, occurrences).
